vouchers.description: 8% off Taiwan Bookings min. spend $100, capped at $15
vouchers.tc: One-time use, limited checkouts available. Applicable to Klook Members residing in Singapore only. T&Cs apply. Available for use on a first-come, first-served basis, code redemption does not guarantee availability for use.

vouchers.applicable_for: All activities & products on Klook (Unless listed under "Non-applicable activities")
vouchers.tc: Citi Mastercard Cardmembers with Singapore phone number and residence only. Valid with min. spend S$250. Discount capped at S$20. Available for use on first-come, first-served basis; code redemption does not guarantee availability for use. One-time use per user account.

vouchers.description: B1G1 on Taiwan High Speed Rail: Routes going to Taichung, Kaohsiung, Chiayi, Tainan, Changhua & Yunlin only
vouchers.tc: Only applicable for selected Taiwan High Speed Rail B1G1 Packages, as follows: Any of the following departure points: Taipei, Nangang, Banqiao, Taoyuan, Hsinchu, Miaoli, Taichung, Changhua, Yunlin, Chiayi, Tainan, Kaohsiung. Heading to to any of the following destinations: Taichung, Changhua, Yunlin, Chiayi, Tainan, Kaohsiung. One-time use only. Description 8% off Taiwan Bookings min. spend $100, capped at $15 Discount value 8% off, min spend SGD 100 ? 8% off, min spend USD 78.45 The amount is based on latest exchange rate. The price shown is for reference only and might not be the final amount.
